data.title: transcosmos receives approval from METI to renew its DX Certified Business Operator certification
data.description: In order to boost corporate value and ensure long-term growth leveraging AI and digital technologies, transcosmos has recently renewed its certification as a DX Certified Business Operator on April 1, 2026. This certification system is crucial for companies looking to thrive in the digital age. This step reflects transcosmos' commitment to staying at the forefront of technological advancements.

data.title: PRIVACY ALERT: Nacogdoches Memorial Hospital Under Investigation for Data Breach of Over 250,000 Records
data.description: A law firm based in San Francisco, Schubert Jonckheer & Kolbe LLP, is currently looking into a data breach incident. This breach has resulted in the unauthorized exposure of sensitive data belonging to 257,073 individuals associated with Nacogdoches Memorial Hospital (NMH), a healthcare facility with 226 beds located in Texas.

data.title: Aedifica NV/SA: Convocation to the Extraordinary General Meeting and Ordinary General Meeting of 12 May 2026
data.description: Aedifica, a publicly-traded real estate company in Belgium, recently held an Extraordinary General Meeting and Ordinary General Meeting on May 12, 2026. This company is listed on both Euronext Brussels and Euronext Amsterdam. The meetings were pivotal for the company, addressing various important matters. Aedifica is recognized for its significant presence in the real estate market, operating under stringent Belgian laws to ensure adherence to regulations. The outcome of these meetings will likely impact the company's future strategies and operations.

data.title: Global AI Innovators Welcomed as WAIC Opens Applications for 2026 SAIL Award With $280,000+ Prize Pool
data.description: On April 2, 2026, in Shanghai, the World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC) has announced that applications are now being accepted worldwide for the 2026 SAIL Award (Super AI Leader), the most prestigious recognition offered by the conference. Transphere Consulting has been selected as the official partner for recruiting applicants from overseas.

data.title: NX Launches Indian Ocean Rim Strategy Office to Expand Operations in South Asia, Oceania and Indian Ocean Rim
data.description: NXSAO, a subsidiary of NIPPON EXPRESS HOLDINGS, INC., based in Tokyo, is enhancing its regional presence through a strategic approach. By incorporating market analysis, strategy development, and creating new opportunities, NXSAO aims to boost its operations in the South Asia and Oceania regions. The initiative, started in April 2026, focuses on leveraging these key components to further establish the company in the targeted areas.
Elis: Trading in own shares disclosed on March 30, 2026.

data.title: Invitation for Annual General Meeting of Fenix Outdoor International AG. Date: 12/18/2022, time: 9 AM, venue: Zurich.
data.description: The latest data indicates that the number of COVID-19 cases has significantly decreased in the past week, with only 500 new cases reported today compared to 1,200 a week ago. The total number of confirmed cases now stands at 50,000. Additionally, there have been 20 new deaths, bringing the total number of fatalities to 2,500. Health officials credit the decrease in cases to the increase in vaccinations, with over 60% of the population now fully vaccinated. They urge continued vigilance and adherence to safety measures to prevent another surge in cases.

data.title: Paradigm, a crypto VC, is launching a prediction market terminal with market-making desk and index.
data.description: In addition to its existing services, Paradigm is considering implementing an internal market-making desk specializing in prediction market trading. They are also looking into creating a prediction market index as part of their offerings.
